relatedBlades.title: Get the latest Gartner® research on Enterprise Networks
relatedBlades.copy:
Enterprise networking is critical for business operations, but with the adoption of hybrid work, business leaders are seeing an opportunity to improve the user experience and simplify their networks to offer a more coffee shop-like experience for their users.

Learn about the shift from campus networking to "coffee shop networking", and what it means for infrastructure teams.

Get your copy of Gartner® Research's "Rethink Enterprise Networks for the Hybrid Workforce" today.
relatedBlades.rightSideCopy:
Gartner, Rethink Enterprise Networks for the Hybrid Workforce, Mike Leibovitz, Andrew Lerner, 28 August 2024 GARTNER is a registered trademark and service mark of Gartner, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the U.S. and internationally and is used herein with permission. All rights reserved.
